speaker: charlie
text: Well there you have it - Tuesday's dose of good vibes from your ParkSyde Bright Side crew. From ocean cleanups to rugby upsets, the world's giving us plenty to smile about.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely! Remember, while the big news channels focus on doom and gloom, there's always amazing things happening when you know where to look.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right. Whether it's groundbreaking science, environmental wins, or sporting fairy tales, there's inspiration everywhere if you've got the right mindset.

speaker: alice
text: That's us for today's bulletin. Keep spreading those good vibes, Queensland - the world needs more of your sunny optimism.

speaker: charlie
text: See you tomorrow for more ParkSyde Bright Side. Until then, keep looking up!
